title: CORDEX FPS-AEROSOL PROTOCOL 1B
author: Somot, Samuel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document describes the simulation protocol 1B of the  CORDEX  Flagship Pilot Study on Aerosol (CORDEX  FPS-aerosol ). It proposes to run regional climate models with and without evolving aerosol forcings in future projections over the Euro-Mediterranean area.
steps_raw: This document describes the simulation protocol 1B of the  CORDEX  Flagship Pilot Study on Aerosol (CORDEX  FPS-aerosol ). It proposes to run regional climate models with and without evolving aerosol forcings in future projections over the Euro-Mediterranean area.
